incomingTransition.notes: Open already in forward motion on the merchant and donkey in the narrow street; establish urgency immediately with no pre-roll calm.
Carry forward the same rider-donkey momentum from the street into denser market traffic; preserve satchel grip and rising panic.
Continue the chase energy into a wider civic space; keep merchant and donkey consistent while the Duomo construction resets the scale around them.
Inherit the same ride and urgency, but compress into tighter framing on the merchant's panic and the satchel as the false stakes peak.
Carry the same frantic momentum into the stop at the doorway; preserve the merchant's panic, then let the action break as he dismounts and lunges inside.
Reset from exterior chase chaos to a still interior library; preserve the merchant's breathless arrival, but replace suspense with quiet judgment.
Hold the library setup from the reveal shot; keep the merchant and librarian in place while the window gag with the donkey and flowers becomes readable.
